definitions.en: The act of applying cosmetics to enhance or alter one's appearance.
definitions.es: El acto de aplicar cosméticos para mejorar o alterar la apariencia de uno.
definitions.vi: Hành động trang điểm để làm nổi bật hoặc thay đổi vẻ ngoài của một người.

example.en: She likes to do her makeup every time she goes out.
example.es: A ella le gusta maquillarse cada vez que sale.
example.vi: Cô ấy thích trang điểm mỗi khi ra ngoài.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Every morning, she usually spends ten minutes to put on makeup before going to work.
My friend really likes learning how to put on makeup to feel more confident when going out.
Can you help me put on makeup for the party tonight?

translation.en: She likes to do makeup every day.

notes_md:
**Trang điểm** means *to put on makeup*. It’s used when someone applies cosmetics to their face.

It’s a verb, usually used with a person as the subject. You can add **cho + someone** if you’re doing makeup for someone else, or **để + verb** to say the purpose (to look nicer, to go out, etc.).


Close synonym: **make up** (borrowed from English, often used in beauty contexts). Opposite idea: **để mặt mộc** (to go bare-faced, no makeup).
exampleSentences: Mỗi sáng, chị thường dành mười phút để trang điểm trước khi đi làm.
Bạn em rất thích học cách trang điểm để tự tin hơn khi ra ngoài.
Em có thể giúp chị trang điểm cho bữa tiệc tối nay không?
notes:

Close synonym: make up (borrowed from English, often used in beauty contexts). Opposite idea: để mặt mộc (to go bare-faced, no makeup).

translation.en: She likes to do makeup every day.
